sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23810" key="dekaba/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκα-βάμων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[βᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n23810.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with ten steps</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">intervals,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑνδεκάχορδε λύρα, δεκαβάμονα τάξιν ἔχουσα</foreign> Ion Lyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2595.tlg001:3:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
